name: Montauk Student Transport
owner_or_parent: Mensch family (part of Montauk family of school bus companies)
principals: John Mensch (founder, Montauk Transit LLC); originally Mensch family of Long Island Montauk Bus Service
districts_or_customers: Franklin, Hillsborough, Bridgewater, New Brunswick, North Brunswick, Edison townships (central NJ); NJ school districts incl. Franklin Township BOE
recent_news: Montauk Student Transport LLC subject to NLRB case 02-CA-174131; broader Montauk family of bus companies has multi-state NJ/NY footprint and history of school district contracts (e.g., Franklin Twp $2.3M contract approval).
fit_notes: Family-owned NJ school bus operator with central NJ district contracts; ~149 employees and multiple Mensch-family related entities (Montauk Transit, Montauk Bus, Montauk Student Transport) suggest possible tuck-in opportunity, though family-of-companies structure may complicate clean carve-out.

name: DNG Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Unknown — no district contracts confirmed online
recent_news: No web presence found; the listed address (3524 Breakwater Ave, Hayward) is now occupied by MedTek College and Acclaim Education, suggesting DNG Bus may have relocated, gone dormant, or wound down. Note family-name overlap with Foreman Sales & Service (a separate Hayward bus dealer) is not the same entity.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm DNG Bus is an active independent school-bus operator; address now hosts unrelated educational institution. Diligence would require Secretary of State + CA HP licensing check before any outreach.

name: Bauer Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Likely Carroll County / Howard County area MD school transportation (HQ Woodbine, MD)
recent_news: Active common authority (USDOT 891882) registered in Woodbine, MD; ~$540K-$972K estimated annual revenue; small charter/school operator with no recent M&A or news coverage.
fit_notes: Independent, owner-operator MD school/charter bus business — small scale (~24 employees) but a clean family-owned profile that fits a tuck-in thesis for Summit's MD presence; succession signal high given single-owner structure.

name: Minnesota Central School Bus
owner_or_parent: unknown — possible affiliation with North America Central School Bus (HIG Capital-owned) unverified
districts_or_customers: Unknown — likely Twin Cities metro/St. Paul area if active
recent_news: No direct web presence found. Name closely resembles North America Central School Bus (NACSB), a HIG Capital-owned platform (acquired from Goldner Hawn) headquartered in Joliet, IL — if affiliated, NOT an independent target. Source data lists a generic mayoclinic.org URL which appears to be erroneous.
fit_notes: Unable to confirm as independent operator; name similarity to HIG-owned NACSB platform raises risk of mis-targeting. Skip until corporate identity, ownership, and operating status can be verified through MN Secretary of State and DOT records.

name: R & D Transportation Svc
districts_or_customers: Golden Gate Regional Center (GGRC), California Regional Centers, Moorpark College, various CA school districts (as broker/manager, not operator)
recent_news: Founded 1991 in Camarillo, CA by Charles Devlin (formerly LA County Office of Education); manages ~1,400 routes and 15,000 trips/day on behalf of Regional Centers/school districts. The SF Divisadero St address in source data appears to be a satellite/registered office; company HQ is Camarillo.
fit_notes: NOT A FIT — R&D Transportation Services is a transportation management/brokerage firm, explicitly NOT a transportation provider. Owns no fleet, does not operate school buses. Should be removed from school-bus operator target list.
